meaning: adv.静悄悄地,无声地,完全静寂地
examples: I crept upstairs and tried to open the door soundlessly.
As I watched she turned, crept soundlessly from the room and was gone.
Even while the speaker is talking, the audience is soundlessly generating future stories tailor-made to their own situations, and hence grounded in reality.
Naima moved soundlessly, cleaning the indifferent surfaces, preparing our joyless meals.
